raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "II. Un fazzifi: Es zelſchohs
us augſchu prett to * ne-apstip-
rinatu Semmi/ es nahfſchu
prett teem/ kas drohſchi dſihwo/
kas wiſſi bes Muhrreem dſihwo/
un teem ne irr nedg Ateſchauja-
mee nedg Wahrtis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "* Eebr: Wall; To Semmi to Zeemu, tas iir,
kam ſtipri Pilsfahti newaid.
12. Laupiht laupidams/ un
pohſiht pohſtidams/ tawn Roh-
fu greeſdams prett tahm poh-
ſtahm Weetabm/ kas attak irr
eedſihwotas/ un prett teem Lan-
dim/ kas no teem Paganeem irr
fapulzeti/ kas Lohpus un Pa-
dohmu irr dabbujuſchi/ un dſih-
wo Semmes Widdû.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "13. Saba un Deedans/ un
tee Prezzineeki no Tarsus/ un
wiſſi winnas Warrenee/ fazzths
us tew: Woj tu nahz Laupi-
ſchanas lanpiht? eſſi tu tawu
Draudſi fapulzinajs ar Pohſti-
ſchanu pohſtiht? Sudrabu un
Seltn nowest? Lohpus un Pa-
dohmu atjemit? leelu Laupijumu
lanpiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "14. Tadehſ fluddina af Zil-
weka Behrus! un fakki us Go-
gu: Ta fakka tas Klunge
KUNGS: Neggi tu tai Deena/
ad manni Ifraeta Laudis droh-
cht dſihwohs/ to fajuttift?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "15. Tad nahſſi tu no tawas
Weetas no Seemeka Puſſes/ tu
un dauds Laudis ar tewim/ wiſſi
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Un tu zelſees us augſchu
prett manneem Ifraeta Laudim/
ka Padebbes to Semmi apklahft/
tas notiks pehdigâ Laika. Tad
weddiſchu es tevi prett mannu
Semmi/ ka tee Pagani mannis
paſihſt/ tad es pee tewim af Gog!
tapſchu twehtihts preekſch win-
n Azzim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Ta fakka tas Klungs
KUNGS: Eſſi tu tas/ no ka es
iſgahjuſchôs Laikds eſmu run-
najes zaur to Rohku mannu
Kalpu to Braweeſchu eekſch If-
raeta/ kas tannis Deenda dauds
Gaddus fluddinaja/ ka es tevi
gribbetu pretti teem weſt?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Bet tas notiks tai Dee-
nâ/ kad Gogs prett Ifraeta
Semmi nahks/ fakka tas Klungs
KUNGS: Tad zelſees manna
Duſiniba ar mannas Bahrsibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "19. Jo es eſmu fawa Karstu-
ma runnajes/ un mannas Apſkat-
ſchanas Ugguni/ ka tai Deena lee-
ia Drebbeſchana buhs eekſch If-
raeta Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "20. Ta ka manna Breekſcha
trihzehs tahs Siwis Juhrs/ un
Putni appaksch Debbes/ un tee
SwehriLanka/ un wiſſi Tahri/
kas wirs Semmes leen/ un wiſſi
Zilweki/ kas Semmes Wirfu irr/
un tee Kalni taps apgahſt/ un
tahs ſtraujas Weetas nokrittihs/
un wiſſi Muhri krittihs pee
Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "21. Jo es afzinaschu to Soh-
biuu
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
